subUnits.title: 4.1 Converting Fractions & Decimals
notes: Decimals are another way to write fractions with denominators of 10, 100, 1000, etc.
To convert fraction to decimal: divide numerator by denominator. Example: 3/4 = 3 ÷ 4 = 0.75
To convert decimal to fraction: write digits over place value. Example: 0.6 = 6/10 = 3/5
Count decimal places: 1 place = tenths (/10), 2 places = hundredths (/100)

quiz.q: Convert 0.25 to a fraction in lowest terms.

subUnits.title: 4.2 Converting Fractions & Percentages
notes: Fraction to %: Multiply fraction by 100. Example: 3/4 × 100 = 75%
Percentage to fraction: Write over 100 & simplify. Example: 60% = 60/100 = 3/5
Decimal to %: Multiply by 100 & add %. % to decimal: Divide by 100.

quiz.q: Convert 80% to a fraction in lowest terms.
Which is the decimal form of 12.5%?
